title: Solar Power Grows Bigger Than Ever
summary: In 2025, solar power grew more than any other energy source in history, according to a report by the Energy Information Agency. This helped clean energy like solar and wind grow faster than the world's energy needs. Solar power alone provided a quarter of the extra energy needed globally. It now makes over 8% of the world's electricity. Batteries for storing energy also grew fast, helping solar work better. Electric cars and heat pumps are becoming more popular, using electricity instead of fossil fuels. The report says we are entering the 'Age of Electricity' because more things are powered by electricity, and solar is leading the way. This is good for reducing pollution and fighting climate change.

keywords.explanation: energy from the sun used to make electricity
a group that studies energy trends
a time when more things use electricity
devices that store energy for later use
cars that run on electricity instead of gasoline
energy that does not pollute the air

questions.question: What grew more than any other energy source in 2025?
Who said we are entering the 'Age of Electricity'?
What helps store energy from solar power?
What percent of the world's electricity did solar power make in 2025?
What is one thing that uses electricity instead of fossil fuels?
Why is solar power growth good for the planet?

background_read: The world uses energy from sources like sun, wind, and fossil fuels. Solar power comes from sunlight and is clean, meaning it doesn't harm the environment. In recent years, people have been using more solar panels to make electricity. This helps fight climate change by reducing carbon emissions. The Energy Information Agency is a trusted group that collects data on energy to help us understand trends. The 'Age of Electricity' is a new idea where electricity becomes the main power for cars, homes, and more, making our energy system cleaner and more efficient.
Article_Structure: WHO: The Energy Information Agency and people using solar power
WHAT: Solar power grew the most ever in 2025, helping clean energy outpace demand
WHERE: All around the world, especially in 30 countries that installed solar
WHY: To reduce pollution and enter the Age of Electricity with more electric devices

perspectives.description: Solar power growth is positive because it reduces carbon emissions and helps fight climate change.
